test.command: cd /Users/ashishhuddar/scopepm/packages/api && bun run test && cd /Users/ashishhuddar/scopepm/packages/web && bun run test

lint.command: Not configured in .factory/services.yaml (project has no ESLint setup; lint validation skipped)

blockingIssues.description: Opening the mobile menu and then crossing to desktop width leaves `document.body.style.overflow` stuck at `hidden` because the landing and dashboard layouts never reset `menuOpen` on breakpoint changes.

`PUT /api/interviews/:id` reads `body.title` and `body.transcript` before guarding that `await c.req.json()` returned an object, so a valid JSON `null` payload throws and returns 500 instead of the required 400 validation response.
The interview edit Cancel button stays active during an in-flight save, so a stale PUT completion can later clear a newer edit session and close the wrong form.
Onboarding step buttons still call `setStep(index)` directly, letting users click ahead without satisfying earlier required fields, so step validation does not truly gate progression.

nonBlockingIssues.description: The invalid-token UI renders `resetError.message` directly, so unfriendly backend wording could leak to users instead of stable friendly copy.
`packages/web/app/__tests__/routes/reset-password.test.tsx` renders an inline replica instead of the real route, so route wiring and `window.location.search` handling are not covered.
`packages/web/app/__tests__/routes/forgot-password.test.tsx` mutates `window.location` without truly restoring the original object, which can leak fake origins into later tests.
`packages/web/app/__tests__/routes/hamburger-nav.test.tsx` validates copied inline nav components instead of the production route implementations, so responsive regressions can slip through.
The dashboard home loading skeleton does not closely approximate the quick-actions layout, which increases layout jump when content loads.
`packages/web/app/__tests__/routes/loading-skeletons.test.tsx` exercises helper components in isolation rather than the real route loading branches.
`packages/web/app/__tests__/routes/interview-edit.test.tsx` mirrors the route in a local test-only component instead of covering `dashboard/interviews.tsx` itself.

appliedUpdates.description: Updated .factory/library/architecture.md to record that TanStack Router route additions also require the committed `packages/web/app/routeTree.gen.ts` artifact to be regenerated or updated before typecheck/build passes.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify when tests-first and manual `agent-browser` verification are mandatory, and require workers to record a deviation instead of reporting `followedProcedure: true` when those steps are skipped.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Reviews for reset-password-page, fix-forgot-password-url, mobile-hamburger-nav, loading-skeletons, interview-edit-ui, form-validation-auth, and form-validation-dashboard all found code changes landed before tests and/or no browser verification despite handoffs still claiming procedure compliance.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add explicit guidance that route/UI tests should import and exercise real production components or routes instead of copied inline replicas/helper-only harnesses unless a documented constraint requires otherwise.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Reviews for reset-password-page, mobile-hamburger-nav, loading-skeletons, and interview-edit-ui each found new tests that passed against local replica components or helper-only renders while missing regressions in the real route implementations.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Narrow the loading-skeleton validation guidance so it checks real loading placeholders instead of requiring `grep -r 'loading-text'` to return zero matches for every dashboard route.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The loading-skeletons review showed the worker had to rewrite unrelated empty-state text styling just to satisfy the broad `loading-text` grep requirement, even though the shared CSS class is also used as a generic centered-text style.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Keep `fulfills` mappings aligned with the routes and behaviors each feature actually changes; for this milestone `VAL-CROSS-002` was attached to form-validation-auth even though the auth-gate redirect logic lives in `packages/web/app/routes/dashboard.tsx`.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The form-validation-auth review found commit `0399507` changed auth-form validation files and tests only, while the guarded dashboard redirect behavior referenced by `VAL-CROSS-002` is implemented elsewhere.

rejectedObservations.observation: The interview-edit-ui review suggested dashboard browser verification may need clearer bootstrap guidance for protected routes.
rejectedObservations.reason: already-documented in .factory/library/user-testing.md, which states that test users can be created via the sign-up flow before validating authenticated dashboard pages.

rejectedObservations.observation: Repeated per-feature notes that `web-worker` procedure adherence was reported too loosely.
rejectedObservations.reason: duplicate of the single systemic web-worker skill recommendation already captured above.
